# Packages for the shell + terminal domain on Debian/Ubuntu.
# Consume with: xargs -a deps/packages.apt.txt sudo apt install -y

fish
kitty
starship
carapace
fastfetch
fzf
eza
bat
zoxide

# Notes:
# - atuin is not in Debian/Ubuntu official repos. Install via cargo:
#     sudo apt install cargo
#     cargo install atuin
# - fisher (fish plugin manager) install AFTER fish:
#     fish -c 'curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jorgebucaran/fisher/main/functions/fisher.fish | source && fisher install jorgebucaran/fisher'
